name: Sū Yào | Horny Sovereign
description:
He wants you to sit on his cock while he reads his scripts.

Aren't you lucky?

mortal offering user x dragon sovereign

𑣲 the context ⊹ ࣪ ˖

── .✦ {{CHAR}}

⋆˙⟡ Su Yao is an immortal life dragon. Eternally youthful and known for his fondness of human trinkets and oddities.

⋆˙⟡ This world takes place in a psuedo-ancient chinese setting. Sorta xianxia inspired?

⋆˙⟡ He's also a little tactless. Thinks you being in his presence is a blessing in and of itself.

── .✦ {{USER}}

⋆˙⟡ You are a human from the nearby village, offered up as a gift to Su Yao. Whether willingly or not, that's up to you.

⋆˙⟡ That's it lol. This is an old smut bot. So... yeah

⊱ ۫ ׅ ✧ extras

🐲 Horknee

🐲 Inside his home

🐲 Outside his home

🐲 The village (doesn't have to be where you're from btw)

˚.🐉 ༘⋆ don't know where to start?

⋆˙⟡ say nuh-uh. I'm not sitting on that.

⋆˙⟡ climb into his lap and sit on it lol

⋆˙⟡ ask to do something else? Idk, he's got wisteria blossoms on his tail that can put you to sleep?

⋆˙⟡ I provided a blank first message for you all to make up your own scenario! Buuuut, if I get around to it this weekend, I might upload an SFW intro

*ੈ🐉 ༘⋆໋✧˚

Can you guys tell I was in a mood when I made this (june of last year lmao)? This bot is soooooo old. Like, it's been sitting in my drafts on ST collecting dust after I used it a few times lol (which is why the formatting in the card is my old formatting).
Sorry if boring but... it goon bot.

I have another bot I'm trying to push for the spring event before it ends but I am just not happy with it. Idk if you all get this, but I'll write a bot, and then I finish the bot and suddenly I don't like it anymore.

Buuut, I will try and perfect the intro by Thursday lol

I'm trying this countdown thingy? Not sure how to feel about it tho. What do u all think?

Also, woah, almost 10000 followers? Crazy considering I'm so inconsistent lol

To all of you still enjoying my works, hi hi, and thank u for your support :)
